result.cover_letter:
19 July 2026

Hiring Team
Meridian Financial
Re: Senior Technical Program Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Meridian Financial,

My background as an Administrator is a direct match for the Senior Technical Program Manager role at Meridian Financial. I bring the exact combination of Certified Scrum Master leadership and deep experience delivering AI/ML programs across Financial Services and Telecommunications — directing a $5M+ portfolio and architecting cloud modernisations that cut delivery time over 30% — that Meridian Financial needs for this Senior Technical Program Manager role.

The role asks for enterprise AI/ML program delivery spanning financial services and telecommunications. At ANZ I led the technical delivery of AI solutions including real-time WebSocket telemetry servers for 10k+ device concurrency, reducing P95 latency to under 200 ms, while my work at Telstra streamlined core delivery workflows with JIRA to boost delivery efficiency by 20%. My Certified Scrum Master credential is backed by current hands-on agile leadership: I own sprint cadence, PI planning, capacity management, and executive reporting for the Agile Kookaburras squad on the ATO's Payday Super reform program. I have directed multi-million-dollar portfolios — the ANZ program portfolio I managed exceeded $5M across five cross-functional squads — and I align executive strategy by facilitating workshops for 40+ GMs and executives, improving decision-making efficiency by over 55%. When complex cross-team issues surface, I convene technical war rooms that produce binding recommendations in under three hours, as I did to unblock stalled NTP function testing.

I would welcome a conversation about how my record of delivering AI/ML-driven transformation with agile discipline and executive alignment can support Meridian Financial's objectives. I am available at your convenience and can walk you through the architectural decisions behind the ANZ telemetry implementation or the ATO test-evidence automation that cut scenario effort from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes.

Sincerely,
Administrator
